basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for React Native Developer, Full Stack Developer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: React Native Developer, Full Stack Developer, Finance and Business Development Executive
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Recruitment 2026: Banaras Hindu University has released the official notification for 3 React Native Developer, Full Stack Developer, Finance and Business Development Executive posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Relaxation of 5% marks (from 55% to 50%) at Master’s level for SC/ST/OBC/Differently abled candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. /B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering, BCA with 55% marks, PGDM/MBA or equivalent
qualification.details: React Native Developer: B.Tech. /B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering with 55% marks and good experience in react native development/ IOS Mobile Application Development. OR BCA with 55% marks with one year experience in react native development/ IOS Mobile Application Development. Full Stack Developer: B.Tech. /B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering and good experience in react.js development or candidates are eligible having certification in full stack development. OR BCA with 55% marks with one year experience in react.js development or candidates are eligible having certification in full stack development. Finance and Business Development Executive: PGDM/MBA or equivalent. Desirable: Specialization in Microfinance and International business having good cognitive and analytical skills in managing finances and increasing operational efficiency in business.

salary_details.details: React Native Developer: Rs.24,000/- per month fixed. Full Stack Developer: Rs.24,000/- per month fixed. Finance and Business Development Executive: Rs.24,000/- per month fixed.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Banaras Hindu University recruitment is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: BHU is recruiting for three posts: React Native Developer, Full Stack Developer, and Finance and Business Development Executive. Each post has one vacancy.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for all three positions will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 24,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the React Native Developer role?
faq.answer: For the React Native Developer position, candidates need a B.Tech./B.E. in Computer Science & Engineering with 55% marks and relevant experience, or a BCA with 55% marks and one year of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for BHU Recruitment 2026 includes a Screening Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for BHU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the Advertisement Number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Advertisement Number for this contractual recruitment by Banaras Hindu University is Contractual 01/2026-27.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any state-wise restrictions. Eligible candidates from anywhere can apply as per the given criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Banaras Hindu University. The link is provided in the Important Links section.
